HGSS.136.0048:
Hello. Oh, you must be new here.
Welcome to the Athlete Shop!\f
Have you and your Pokémon
been exercising?\f
Flying sweat!
Breathing in unison!\r
Newborn friendship!\f
We support your Pokéathlete lifestyle.
The Athlete Points you have earned\r
can be used here for prizes.\f
Let me say this again.
Welcome to the Athlete Shop! [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0050:
We are closed for the day.
Please come back tomorrow for\r
a whole new set of prizes!
HGSS.136.0052:
The scores in the Pokéathlon...
The proof of your friendship with your\r
Pokémon, so to speak, give you\r
Athlete Points.\f
You can trade them here for
various prizes.\f
Score as much as possible and come back
here for prizes!\f
Is there anything else I can do
for you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0053:
Welcome!\f
This is the place we keep the Pokéathlon
database.\f
Using the Data Card at the monitor
next to me will allow you to check your\r
records.\f
Some are cool, and some are...
embarrassing!\f
Please make good use of it.\f
Would you like to buy a Data Card
that contains Pokéathlon\r
records? [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0054:
Welcome!\f
The Data Card, which contains
Pokéathlon records, is sold here.\f
Would you like to buy a Data Card? [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0055:
Giggle!
The truth is, I know a lot about you!\r
Let me see...\f
HGSS.136.0056:
You’ve participated in
the Pokéathlon...\r
[0133,0000,0000] times!\r
Giggle!\f
HGSS.136.0057:
You’ve participated in
the Pokéathlon...\r
Wow, over 100 times!\f
Bravo!\f
HGSS.136.0058:
As I just demonstrated, the Pokéathlon
database seems to know everything.\r
Doesn’t that interest you?\f
You can exchange your Athlete Points
for a Data Card and check your\r
records using the monitor next to me.\f
Please make good use of it.
Is there anything else I can\r
do for you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0060:
Hello, Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Are you working on breaking your own
records? You can check your records\r
at the monitor next to me.\f
Check it out from time to time!
HGSS.136.0061:
We have run out of Data Cards.
But don’t be disappointed.\f
There are more Data Cards to come!
I will make sure to get them for you.\r
Please come back later.
HGSS.136.0062:
We have run out of Data Cards.
But don’t be disappointed.\f
There are more Data Cards to come...
Or not!\f
You have collected all the Data Cards!
Wonderful!\f
You are a true Pokéathlete,
[0103,0000,0000]!\f
Please continue to work on breaking
your own records!\f
Thank you for coming!
HGSS.136.0063:
So they have ten events?
...Which Pokémon should I choose?
HGSS.136.0064:
There are five Pokéathlon courses!\f
They are divided into Speed, Power,
Stamina, Jump, and Skill.\f
You have to choose your Pokémon
carefully according to the course.
HGSS.136.0065:
Some Pokémon are good at Speed events.
Some are not. You need to form a team\r
whose members can help one another.
HGSS.136.0066:
If you go on, you’ll see the
Museum of Pokéathlete Records.\f
I will someday be a Pokéathlete holding
a record there!
HGSS.136.0067:
The score you achieve in the Pokéathlon
will become Athlete Points, and you can\r
exchange them for prizes.\f
You may be the last team to finish, but
your score will still count!
HGSS.136.0068:
“Hurdle Dash”\f
Many Hurdles await your Pokémon!
Be faster and more precise than\r
everyone else! Jump over the Hurdles\r
and aim for number one!
HGSS.136.0069:
“Pennant Capture”\f
Pennants are hidden on the beach.
Fight over them and come back with as\r
many Pennants as you can!
HGSS.136.0070:
“Circle Push”\f
The time has come to show off your
Pokémon’s Power!\r
Push them away and stay in the Circle!
HGSS.136.0071:
“Block Smash”\f
A mountain of Blocks awaits
your Pokémon!\r
Use its Power to smash them all!
HGSS.136.0072:
“Disc Catch”\f
Discs are thrown at you. Jump and
catch them in the air!\f
Don’t get cornered by others.
Catch as many as you can!
HGSS.136.0073:
“Lamp Jump”\f
You never know how high you’re going
to bounce! Use your Pokémon’s Jump\r
and Skill to score!
HGSS.136.0074:
“Relay Run”\f
Keep running until you can’t run
any more! Three Pokémon work together\r
to achieve victory!
HGSS.136.0075:
“Ring Drop”\f
Pokémon tackle! Go beyond your Stamina
limit and stay in the Ring!
HGSS.136.0076:
“Snow Throw”\f
On an incredibly cold playfield,
millions of balls of Snow await!\f
Aim and throw!
Time it right to show your skill!
HGSS.136.0077:
“Goal Roll”\f
Put your heart into hitting the ball!
Attack! Defend your Goal!\f
Aim for the other Goals!
Who gets the victory?
HGSS.136.0078:
Work with your Pokémon. Believe in them,
and help them believe in you! Believe in\r
their potential. Let the friendship lead\r
your team to victory!\f
The Pokéathlon is always with you!
HGSS.136.0079:
Charge your energy with friendship!
Give Aprijuice to your Pokémon!
HGSS.136.0080:
Whitney: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Are you here
for the Pokéathlon? Me, too!\f
I have been so excited since its
construction. It is close to Goldenrod\r
City, you know?\f
HGSS.136.0081:
Huh?\f
Were you going to participate in
the Pokéathlon looking like that?\f
You’re not prepared at all, are you?\f
So...
Are you a medium or a small?\r
You look more like a medium...\f
OK!
I’ll get you a jersey that suits you!\f
You want to look your best if you’re
going to participate in the Pokéathlon,\r
don’t you?\f
Wait right there!\f
HGSS.136.0082: This is just right for you!\f
HGSS.136.0084:
You look perfect.
Now that you are ready, I will...\f
Oh, no!
Where are my Pokémon?\f
I have to go back.
See ya!\f
HGSS.136.0085:
The vending machine is for participants!
You can even use your\r
Athlete Points. [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0087:
Clang!\f
A can of [0108,0000,0000] dropped down.\f
HGSS.136.0088:
Clang!\f
Bonus! Another can of [0108,0000,0000]
dropped down.\f
HGSS.136.0091: Decided not to buy a drink.
HGSS.136.0093: Which data would you like to see? [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0103:
Wow, you have such good eyes! Can
I tell you about my last dream? [0200,0000]
HGSS.136.0104:
Hmmm... My discerning eyes must have
become weak...
HGSS.136.0105:
I used to love Jump events.\f
The record I have from when I was fully
active as a Pokéathlete is 998 jumps!\f
Just two more!
All I had to make was two more!\f
I had to retire due to my age...
Could I ask you to jump 1,000 times\r
for me?\f
HGSS.136.0106:
Well, the record may make you dizzy.
But you’re still young.\r
You can do it!\f
I’ll just sit and wait.
HGSS.136.0107:
Oh! You!
It is so wonderful of you!\r
You have jumped 1,000 times.\f
Thank you so much!
This is just a token of my appreciation.\f
HGSS.136.0108:
I’m now your fan. I’m old as you see,
but I will support you no matter what.
HGSS.136.0109:
You know what?
I have tackled over 500 times finally!\f
HGSS.136.0110:
Haha!
You’re doing fine, but not as good\r
as me. I wonder if any Pokéathlete\r
could be better at tackling than me.\r
Sigh...
HGSS.136.0111:
You know what?
I have tackled over 1,000 times!\r
Finally!\f
HGSS.136.0112:
You know what? I’ve finally tackled
over 2,000 times! I bet no one can\r
break this record easily!\f
HGSS.136.0113:
......!
No! That’s not right!\r
Your record beats mine?\f
Nooooo!
...OK. You win.\f
I admit complete defeat.
Please take this.\f
HGSS.136.0114:
Whew!
It’s strange, but I feel great.\f
I do regret that I lost, but it made
me know where I am.\f
I understand that there are many
Pokéathletes better than me.\f
This is where I begin to grow again!
Keep up the good work!
